calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-108 sec-7 learned-gating 2x2 falsifier (learned w_chan x learned W_lat settling) on the GAP-A foraging substrate
items.note: ARC-108 sec-7 SELECTION 2x2 learned-gating falsifier (design-of-record dopamine_into_gating_design_2026-06-22.md sec 5). The next MECH-439 (F-dominance) attack: does a LEARNED signed-RPE-driven per-channel selection weight (ARC-108 w_chan) and/or a learned recurrent lateral-inhibition settling step (MECH-450 W_lat) CONVERT committed-action-class diversity where the PURE-ARITHMETIC envelope plateaus? 5 arms: A0 envelope-only / A1 learned-w_chan / A2 learned-W_lat-settling / A3 both + ARM_NOISE verified-lifting matched-noise temperature control. The landed arithmetic envelope (use_f_eligibility_demotion + use_f_eligibility_adaptive_floor + use_go_nogo_constitution + modulatory-authority/top_k shortlist) is a MATCHED CONSTANT on all arms (exactly as V3-EXQ-699); the ONLY toggled flags are use_learned_channel_gating x use_learned_settling_step. C1 conversion (committed-class entropy strict-above A0 AND noise on >=2/3 seeds) + C2 learning-load-bearing (grows over training + w_chan/W_lat moved from init). C3 signed-vs-unsigned-RPE ablation DEFERRED to a substrate flag (no runtime knob; user-confirmed 2026-06-22). Non-vacuity self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue if pool not divergent / delta_t flat / weights never move / noise control not lifting; preconditions-met no-lift routes to V4 full-loop scope bet (NOT a false ARC-107 weakening). experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING until it scores (MECH-439 substrate_ceiling + ARC-108/MECH-450 substrate_conditional => promote/demote suppressed). Validator OK; dry-run smoke exit 0 self-routed substrate_not_ready at toy scale; wiring probe confirmed both flags engage (settling 60/60 ticks, w_chan+W_lat moved, delta_t non-flat). RE-DERIVE BRAKE EXEMPT (Step 2.5b, verify-then-ignore): NOT a same-granularity lettered re-test of the arithmetic-envelope lineage -- it is a NEW EXQ NUMBER testing a DIFFERENT mechanism (LEARNED, signed-RPE-driven gating: ARC-108 w_chan + MECH-450 W_lat; claim_ids ADD ARC-108/MECH-450), the explicit 'learned-NOT-arithmetic' attack on MECH-439 per dopamine_into_gating_design_2026-06-22.md. The required upstream substrate IS built: ARC-108 JOB-1 step-1 (ree-v3 ae907b5) + MECH-450 step-2 (ree-v3 9839492018), both documented IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-22 in ree-v3/CLAUDE.md. The 3 prior MECH-439 autopsies (689/689a/f-dominance-cluster) circled the arithmetic-envelope levers (MECH-447/448/449), a DIFFERENT mechanism class than learned gating.

items.title: Closure-plane commit-ENTRY TRAJECTORY readiness + bool-vs-trajectory comparison: does use_closure_commit_entry_trajectory STEP a closure-formed committed program the bool latch cannot? (3-arm diagnostic)
items.note: rung-6 of f_dominance_conversion_ceiling / commitment_closure:GAP-4. CLAIM-FREE substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[]; experiment_purpose=diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING, no governance weight). SIBLING of V3-EXQ-460m (NOT a supersede): 460m certifies the bool latch (use_closure_commit_entry, ree-v3 main 84c1e7c) 2-arm; 460n adds the TRAJECTORY arm and re-includes the bool arm so the bool-vs-trajectory distinction is measured in ONE run on ONE trained substrate per seed. Validates the C-STEP TRAJECTORY extension use_closure_commit_entry_trajectory (ree-v3 main 96ee30c) -- the parallel sticky e3._closure_committed_trajectory the between-tick stepping consults so a closure-armed hold ADVANCES a committed program instead of repeating _last_action (the bool latch cannot be stepped). Runs on the closure-exclusive de-commit eval substrate (closure_exclusive_decommit_eval + use_closure_commit_beta_coupling + use_natural_commit_latch_hold + beta_gate_bistable + use_lateral_pfc_analog + Leg-C trained rule_bias_head, ARMED in ALL arms); the swept variables are the two commit-ENTRY flags. ARM_ENTRY_OFF reproduces the 460k/460l ncl_hold_closure_armed_total=0 baseline; ARM_BOOL = use_closure_commit_entry; ARM_TRAJECTORY = + use_closure_commit_entry_trajectory. PRIMARY load-bearing gate (a) occupancy: BOTH latch arms armed_and_sustained (ncl_hold_closure_armed_total>0 AND max_consecutive_beta_run>=2) on >=2/3 guard seeds; ARM_ENTRY_OFF armed==0. Gate (b) C-STEP (bool-vs-trajectory EVIDENCE, NOT the readiness gate): ARM_TRAJECTORY closure_program_steps_total>0 (between-tick committed-program steps) while ARM_BOOL==0 on >=2/3. NON-VACUITY self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a falsification) if no goal-active rule-directed commitment forms (n_rule_directed_commit_ticks below floor) or the foraging contact guard is unmet. PASS = occupancy ready on both latch arms; the C-STEP outcome labels the interpretation (trajectory_arms_sustains_and_steps_bool_only_sustains if both gates hold; occupancy_ready_cstep_distinction_unmet if occupancy holds but C-STEP does not). The evidence informs WHICH latch the 460-lineage de-commit successor uses (occupancy-only -> bool may suffice; needs a stepped program -> trajectory) -- successor (NEW letter, supersedes the parked 460k/460l line) stays blocked on this readiness result + the 96ee30c landing; queued separately. Do NOT re-author 460d/e/f/g/h/i/j/k/l. Design doc: REE_assembly/docs/architecture/natural_commit_occupancy_release.md (closure-plane commit-ENTRY TRAJECTORY / C-STEP extension section). Unit contracts: ree-v3/tests/contracts/test_closure_commit_entry.py (bool C-KEY) + test_closure_commit_entry_trajectory.py (trajectory C-KEY/C-STEP/C-YIELD/C-OFF). validate_experiments --strict --paths OK; dry-run smoke clean (3 arms end-to-end, toy-scale self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue as designed, ARM_ENTRY_OFF armed=0 contrast visible).
